use_cases: Hero section animated background with morphing light effects
Landing page visual decoration with rotating gradient patterns
Loading state visual with color-shifting effects
Full-screen immersive background for marketing sites
Decorative canvas element for creative portfolios
ai_summary: A morphing light effect component using Three.js with custom GLSL shaders to create animated gradient color transitions. The effect generates a rotating, color-shifting pattern by combining distance-based light calculations with time-animated hue mixing, producing a vibrant cyan-to-magenta gradient that morphs continuously. Ideal for hero backgrounds, decorative sections, and immersive visual effects on SaaS and media platforms.
